Klasse BankTree.Bank

java.lang.Object
de.btu.kt.syx.devices.BankTree.Bank
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
Serializable
Umschließende Klasse:
BankTree<T extends BankTree.IBankObject>
public class BankTree.Bank extends Object implements Serializable
Contains a list of bank object nodes in a bank tree.
Autor:
Matthias Wolff
Siehe auch:
  • Serialisierte Form

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    BankTree<T>.BankObject
    addBankObject(String objectUID, String objectName)
    Adds a bank object node without a bank object to this bank.
    BankTree<T>.BankObject
    addBankObject(String objectUID, T object)
    Adds a bank object node with a bank object to this bank.
    T
    getBankObject(String objectUID)
    Returns a bank object in this bank.
    String
    getBankObjectName(String objectUID)
    Returns the name of a bank object in this bank.
    List<BankTree<T>.BankObject>
    getBankObjects()
    Returns the bank objects in this bank.
    List<String>
    getBankObjectUIDs()
    Returns the unique identifiers of the bank objects in this bank.
    String
    getName()
    Returns the name of this node.
    BankTree<T>
    getParent()
    Returns the parent of this node.
    BankTree<T>
    getRoot()
    Returns the root node of the bank tree containing this node.
    String
    getUID()
    Returns the globally unique identifier of this node in the bank tree.
    String
    prettyPrint()
    Pretty-prints this node into a string.
    void
    reset()
    Clears the list of child nodes.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden java.lang.Object

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Methodendetails

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Clears the list of child nodes.

    • getRoot

      public BankTree<T> getRoot()
      Returns the root node of the bank tree containing this node.

    • getParent

      public BankTree<T> getParent()
      Returns the parent of this node.

    • getUID

      public String getUID()
      Returns the globally unique identifier of this node in the bank tree.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the name of this node.
      Gibt zurück:
      The name, may be null

    • addBankObject

      public BankTree<T>.BankObject addBankObject(String objectUID, String objectName) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Adds a bank object node without a bank object to this bank.
      Parameter:
      objectUID - The unique object identifier in this bank
      objectName - The object name
      Gibt zurück:
      The newly created bank object node
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if
      • objectUID is null or empty, or not unique, or
      • objectName is null or empty

    • addBankObject

      public BankTree<T>.BankObject addBankObject(String objectUID, T object) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Adds a bank object node with a bank object to this bank.
      Parameter:
      objectUID - The unique object identifier in this bank
      object - The bank object
      Gibt zurück:
      The newly created bank object node
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if
      • objectUID is null or empty, or not unique, or
      • object is null

    • getBankObjectUIDs

      public List<String> getBankObjectUIDs()
      Returns the unique identifiers of the bank objects in this bank.
      Gibt zurück:
      A list of bank object UIDs, may be empty

    • getBankObjects

      public List<BankTree<T>.BankObject> getBankObjects()
      Returns the bank objects in this bank.
      Gibt zurück:
      A list of bank object nodes, may be empty

    • getBankObject

      public T getBankObject(String objectUID) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Returns a bank object in this bank.
      Parameter:
      objectUID - The unique object identifier in this bank
      Gibt zurück:
      The bank object
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if objectUID is null or empty, or if no such object exists

    • getBankObjectName

      public String getBankObjectName(String objectUID)
      Returns the name of a bank object in this bank.
      Parameter:
      objectUID - The unique object identifier in this bank
      Gibt zurück:
      The name
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if objectUID is null or empty, or if no such object exists

    • prettyPrint

      public String prettyPrint()
      Pretty-prints this node into a string.
      Gibt zurück:
      The string
